metadata.name: Washer Library
metadata.description: ISO 7089/7090/7091/7093/8738 and DIN 125/9021 plain washer master geometry.
metadata.primary_source: ISO 7089/7090/7091/7093/8738 and DIN 125/9021 product-dimension standards. Verified only for the sizes listed in VERIFIED_ISO7089 (ISO 7089 only); all other records are ratio-estimated (reference_only).

records.notes: Plain washer, normal series, product grade A. All dimensions are the verified ISO 7089 standard table values for M3.
